entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where the agriculture sector is a cornerstone of the economy

entities.name: AGRICULTURE SECTOR
entities.description: The part of the economy employing over 70% of the population in Ethiopia

entities.name: GENERIC FERTILIZER ADVICE
entities.description: A limiting factor in Ethiopia's agriculture sector that hampers productivity

entities.name: HARMONIZED DIGITAL FERTILIZER AND AGRONOMIC SOLUTIONS (HAFAS)
entities.description: An innovative digital tool that integrates advanced data to deliver precise, site-specific fertilizer and agro-advisory recommendations

entities.name: SITE-SPECIFIC FERTILIZER AND AGRO-ADVISORY RECOMMENDATIONS
entities.description: Precise recommendations delivered by HaFAS to improve agricultural outcomes

entities.name: CEREAL
entities.description: Crops whose production is expected to increase from 31.6 million to 140 million metric tons

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: ECONOMIC RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of an economy to withstand and recover from shocks
